auth.required: Authentication required. Please provide a valid JWT token.
auth.userNotFound: User not found. Token may be invalid.
auth.tokenExpired: Token has expired. Please login again.
auth.invalidPublicKey: Invalid Stellar public key format. Must be a valid G-address (Ed25519 public key)
auth.userExists: User with this public key already registered
auth.usernameLength: Username must be between 3 and 50 characters
auth.userNotFoundRegister: User not found. Please register first.
auth.signatureMismatch: Public key mismatch between request body and signed challenge.
auth.challengeRequired: challengeToken is required. First call GET /api/auth/challenge?publicKey=<your-key>
auth.signedXdrRequired: signedXDR is required. Sign the challenge transaction with your Stellar wallet.
auth.keyAlreadyLinked: This Stellar public key is already linked to another account
auth.validPublicKeyRequired: Valid Stellar public key is required

token.securityScanRequired: Security scan required before deployment. Please complete a security scan first.
token.scanNotFound: Security scan result not found: {scanId}. Please complete a security scan first.
token.scanNotOwned: The provided scanId does not belong to your account.
token.deploymentBlocked: Deployment blocked: the security scan ({scanId}) found vulnerabilities.
token.fieldsRequired: name, symbol, contractId, and sourcePublicKey are required
token.contractAlreadyRegistered: Contract ID is already registered by a different owner

apiKey.required: API key required. Provide it via the X-API-Key header.
apiKey.missingScopes: API key is missing required scope(s): {scopes}

rateLimit.exceeded: Too many requests. Please try again later.

validation.holderBalanceRequired: contractId and holderBalance query params are required
validation.invalidAddress: holderAddress must be a valid 56-character Stellar address
validation.dividendParamsRequired: contractId, depositorAddress, amountStroops, and totalSupply are required
validation.positiveAmount: amountStroops must be a positive integer
validation.positiveTotal: totalSupply must be a positive integer
validation.opsRange: ops must be an integer between 1 and 100
validation.feePositive: feeStroops must be a positive integer
validation.notEligible: Transaction is not eligible for sponsorship: {reasons}
validation.invalidStellarAddress: contractId must be a valid Stellar C-address (56 chars, starts with C)
validation.invalidPublicKeyFormat: publicKey must be a valid Stellar G-address (56 chars, starts with G)
validation.budgetNonNegative: requestedBudgetStroops must be a non-negative integer

nft.invalidArray: collection.json must contain an array of NFT metadata objects
nft.missingImage: Each metadata item must have an id and an image field
nft.imageNotFound: Image {image} not found in ZIP for NFT {id}
nft.contractAlreadyRegistered: Contract ID is already registered by a different owner

security.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to view this scan result.
security.deletePermissionDenied: You do not have permission to delete this scan result.

sponsorship.disabled: Sponsorship is not enabled on this server
sponsorship.inactiveAccount: Only active users can apply for sponsorship

fee.horizonUnavailable: Unable to fetch fee statistics from Horizon

cors.originDenied: Origin not allowed by CORS policy

batch.lockFailed: Account is currently busy processing another transaction. Please try again later.

delegation.getByOwnerFailed: Failed to get delegations by owner: {error}
delegation.getByDelegateFailed: Failed to get delegations by delegate: {error}
delegation.mintCheckFailed: Failed to check if can mint: {error}

recovery.backupError: BACKUP_ENCRYPTION_PASSWORD not configured - cannot perform recovery test

wasm.timeout: Transaction timed out or stuck in unknown state
wasm.pastScheduling: Cannot schedule a mint in the past.

mintQueue.transactionTimeout: Transaction timed out or stuck in unknown state

bridge.rpcFailed: EVM RPC request failed with HTTP {status}
bridge.relayFailed: Bridge relay endpoint responded with HTTP {status}
bridge.notConfigured: Bridge relayer is not properly configured

stellar.noRpcUrls: No RPC URLs provided for FailoverRpcServer

config.corsOriginRequired: CORS origin must be a non-empty string
config.corsProtocol: CORS origin must use http or https: {origin}
config.corsBareOrigin: CORS origin must be a bare origin without path, query, hash, or credentials: {origin}
config.corsStringRequired: CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS must be a comma-separated string

lock.redisNotConnected: Redis cache is not connected, cannot acquire lock
